title: 10 medicinal preparations of Angelica sinensis (dong quai)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Angelica sinensis teas is used to promote women's health and well-being. The tea has been traditionally used to alleviate menstrual cramps, hot flashes, and other symptoms associated with menopause. It is also believed to improve circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost overall energy levels. Additionally, the tea may help to regulate hormones, treat gynecological issues, and even support fertility.

Angelica sinensis tinctures is used to treat a variety of women's health issues. It has been traditionally used to alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and mood swings associated with PMS. Additionally, it is believed to help regulate hormones, improve fertility, and even reduce hot flashes in menopausal women. The tincture can also be used to soothe digestive issues and calm anxiety symptoms. Its adaptogenic properties make it a popular natural remedy for promoting overall well-being.

Angelica sinensis capsules is used to treat various health issues. They are particularly beneficial in regulating menstrual cycles and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Additionally, the capsules may help to improve circulation, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of chronic fatigue syndrome. Some people also use them to boost their energy levels and overall well-being.

Angelica sinensis tablets is used to alleviate various health issues. It is traditionally employed to treat menstrual cramps, hot flashes, and other symptoms associated with menopause. The tablets are also used to improve blood circulation, reduce fatigue, and promote overall women's health. Additionally, it may help to regulate irregular periods, relieve premenstrual syndrome (PMS) symptoms, and support fertility and reproductive health.

Angelica sinensis decoctions is used to promote women's health and alleviate various symptoms associated with menstruation, menopause, and pregnancy. The decoction is believed to balance the body's energy, or "qi", and is often used to treat conditions such as menstrual cramps, bloating, and hot flashes. It may also help to improve blood circulation and reduce fatigue, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues.

Angelica sinensis salves is used to promote women's health and alleviate various menstrual-related issues. The salve is often applied topically to ease cramps, bloating, and mood swings associated with PMS. Additionally, it may help reduce hot flashes and night sweats in menopausal women. The antispasmodic properties of the salve also make it effective in soothing digestive discomfort and reducing inflammation.

Angelica sinensis ointments is used to alleviate a range of women's health issues. It is often applied topically to relieve menstrual cramps, bloating, and breast tenderness associated with PMS. Additionally, it helps to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor cuts due to its anti-inflammatory properties. Dong quai ointment can also be used to calm joint pain and stiffness, making it a natural remedy for arthritis sufferers.

Angelica sinensis creams is used to promote women's reproductive health and alleviate menstrual cramps, bloating, and hot flashes associated with menopause. It has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe skin irritations, acne, and eczema. Additionally, these creams can aid in wound healing, reduce fine lines and wrinkles, and even treat vaginal dryness and yeast infections. Its antioxidant-rich composition also makes it a popular ingredient for anti-aging skincare products.

Angelica sinensis gels is used to alleviate symptoms of menstrual disorders such as cramps, bloating, and mood swings. The gel's anti-inflammatory properties help soothe period pains, while its antispasmodic effects ease digestive issues. Additionally, it is believed to improve blood circulation, reduce menopausal symptoms like hot flashes and night sweats, and even support fertility health. The gels are also used to treat conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and respiratory problems.

Angelica sinensis syrups is used to alleviate various health issues. The syrup has been traditionally used to treat menstrual cramps, bloating, and other premenstrual syndrome (PMS) symptoms. It's also believed to help regulate menstruation, ease menopausal symptoms, and improve overall hormonal balance. Additionally, the syrup may aid in reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting immune function. Its anti-inflammatory properties can also soothe digestive issues and respiratory problems.

intro: Angelica sinensis has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions. These preparations are commonly used to treat menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and various gynecological issues. The plant's active compounds, including ferulic acid and ligustilide, have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it a popular remedy for relieving period pain and improving circulation. Additionally, dong quai is often used to regulate blood sugar levels and alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS).
intro_desc: Angelica sinensis has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules. These preparations are traditionally used to treat menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and to promote relaxation and reduce stress. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties also make it useful for treating arthritis and other joint-related conditions. Additionally, dong quai is believed to have antioxidant and anti-aging effects, which may help to improve overall health and well-being.
